prompt: Create a high-detail top-down orthographic 2D terrain albedo map for a classic military RTS battlefield. Vertical 1:2 composition, full map texture only. Terrain features: dark heather grass, worn dirt paths, cracked asphalt road strips, shallow streams with muddy banks, rocky cliff bands, ore/mineral fields made only of natural mineral rocks and colored crystal/ore clusters, flat empty concrete base-pad zones embedded flush with the terrain, crater scars, scattered stones, mud and grass variation. STRICT TERRAIN ONLY. Absolutely no buildings, no vehicles, no infantry, no units, no turrets, no walls, no crates, no props, no machinery, no antennas, no raised structures, no equipment, no UI, no text, no logos, no faction insignia. Concrete pads must be plain empty flat slabs/foundations only, with no details that resemble buildings or vehicles. No copyrighted IP and no recognizable Command & Conquer, Red Alert, EA, GDI, Nod, Soviet, or Allied references. Game-ready diffuse/albedo texture, readable RTS terrain layout, orthographic top-down, no perspective camera tilt.
